mapper.select: select id, ent_code, out_put_id, unit_name, inspector, ops_unit, ops_user, check_date, check_reason, check_flag, check_conclusion, remark from t_enforce_record where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into t_enforce_record (ent_code, out_put_id, unit_name, inspector, ops_unit, ops_user, check_date, check_reason, check_flag, check_conclusion, remark) values (#{entCode}, #{outPutId}, #{unitName}, #{inspector}, #{opsUnit}, #{opsUser}, #{checkDate}, #{checkReason}, #{checkFlag}, #{checkConclusion}, #{remark})
